$comment: Source of truth for CURRENT model IDs (ADR-0045 + ADR-0054 Phase 1b). `loom doctor`'s model-id-current check flags any .claude/agents/*.md `model:` field not in `current`, and maps known-retired IDs to their replacement. Update this file (and bump last_verified) when a new model generation releases — it is the single place model-ID currency is maintained.
